title: Retired Standalone Catalogue Write Server
summary: Removed the standalone `scripts/catalogue/catalogue_write_server.py` HTTP wrapper after Local Studio catalogue writes moved behind focused service modules and the local app server.
effect: `bin/dev-studio` no longer exposes or starts a port-8788 catalogue write fallback, tests no longer import the retired handler dispatch table, and current docs describe catalogue write behavior as Local Studio app-owned service modules.
